name: Maksim
cooked: Hi guys, I’m new here, found this thread today. I just got mine TE Stem player, sorry for the silly question, but did you found a firmware somewhere to upload on the https://solderless.engineering? Because when I open the site with the device plugged, I don’t see anything to connect it or am I being stupid? sorry for the dumb question
